title: verbascum longifolium subsp. pannosum
intro: Verbascum longifolium subsp. pannosum, also known as the woolly mullein, is a plant species belonging to the mullein family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Verbascum longifolium subsp. pannosum include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in the healing of skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or poultice, and its leaves, flowers, and roots are used in various herbal preparations for their medicinal value.
